div.p: Linearization Point The precise clock cycle where the atomic swap is validated by the memory controller or cache coherency logic (MESI Protocol).

ul.li: Invalidate local cache line if MESI state is 'I'
Load target memory into local register RAX
Speculative: assumes RAX is still valid

div.p: Atomic Primitive (Instruction Pointer): asm lock cmpxchg [rdi], rbx

ol.li: Lock Bus/Cache: Assert LOCK# or lock cache line.
Swap: If EQ, [RDI] = RBX. Else, RAX = [RDI].

ul.li: Value new_val is now globally visible
[RDI] was modified by another core (MESI: Remote Write)
RAX is automatically updated with current value of [RDI]
Prevents pipeline flush on memory violation
